name: 💡 Feature request
about: Suggest a new methodology, data source, UI affordance, or anything else
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement

## The itch

<!-- What are you trying to do that the current app doesn't let you? A concrete example helps. -->

## What you'd want

<!-- How should this work end-to-end? Imagine you're describing the ideal version to someone seeing it for the first time. -->

## Methodology reference (if applicable)

## Would you be willing to send a PR?

- [ ] Yes, I can implement this (possibly with guidance)
- [ ] Yes, I can help test but not implement
- [ ] No, just reporting the idea
